short.en: ESP32-C3 + capacitive probe that lights an LED and pings Telegram when the soil drops below threshold.
short.sl: ESP32-C3 + kapacitivna sonda zasveti z LED in pošlje sporočilo na Telegram, ko vlaga v zemlji pade pod prag.

description.en: Capacitive probes don't corrode like resistive ones. Calibration is two readings (dry and submerged); everything between is mapped 0–100. Deep-sleep wake every 30 minutes pushes battery life past three months on a 1200 mAh LiPo.
description.sl: Kapacitivne sonde ne korodirajo kot uporovne. Kalibracija sta dve meritvi (suho in potopljeno); vmesni razpon se preslika 0–100. Globoko spanje z vzbujanjem vsakih 30 minut omogoča preko tri mesece delovanja na 1200 mAh LiPo akumulatorju.
